footer.tagline: Autonomous AI agents that run locally, think globally, and execute privately.

newsletter.desc: Agent updates, model support releases, and World-Mode news.

demo.subtitle: See it in action.
demo.desc: The real must-b onboarding — from install to a live local agent in under 30 seconds.

hero.title:
Cloud Brain,
Local Muscle.
hero.subtitle: An autonomous agent framework that runs AI locally on your hardware, delegates tasks to a multi-tier swarm, and syncs identity globally.

roadmap.title: B2B Roadmap
roadmap.subtitle: Evolution of the Swarm.
roadmap.desc: From individual trigger pipelines to enterprise-wide cognitive networks.

4.text: Global App Store for custom AI skills.

features.title: Features
features.subtitle: Built for autonomous work.
features.desc: A framework where agents plan, delegate, and execute — locally, privately, and at scale.

planning.title: Autonomous Planning
planning.desc: must-b uses GPT-4o and Claude 3.5 Sonnet as its reasoning layer. Given a goal, it decomposes the work into a directed task graph — spawning specialized sub-agents per node, resolving dependencies, retrying failures, and collapsing results back into a final output. Zero manual orchestration.

control.title: Full OS Control
control.desc: Agents have direct access to your shell, filesystem, and git. They can run arbitrary commands, read and patch files, commit changes, open PRs, and chain tool calls across sessions — all from a single natural-language instruction.

privacy.title: Privacy First
privacy.desc: Every node generates an Ed25519 key pair at install time. Execution stays local — model weights run on your hardware, tool calls never leave your machine. Zero telemetry, zero data retention. Cloud sync is opt-in, end-to-end signed.

pricing.title: Pricing
pricing.subtitle: Autonomy that exceeds limits.
pricing.desc: Intelligence and performance at every scale, from hobby projects to massive enterprise architectures.

free.title: Must-b Free
free.desc: Limited single-agent entry level designed for testing system fundamentals.
features: Basic Terminal Autonomy: Folder and git operations.
Limited Transaction Volume: Daily $2 usage limit.
Single-Agent Execution: Executes tasks sequentially.
Session-Based Memory: Forgets context when closed.
Limited Skill Access: Only core tools active.

pro.title: Must-b Pro
pro.desc: Leave all the drudgery to it. A fully authorized assistant that takes control of your computer.
features: Daily $20 Autonomous Transaction Volume: Continuous development.
Hundreds of System Skills: Integrated with the OS.
Autonomous Browser Engine: Navigates and analyzes like a human.
Ghost Mode (Physical Control): Controls mouse and keyboard.
Persistent Cognitive Memory (Cloud LTM): Never forgets the past.

elite.title: Must-b Elite
elite.desc: High-level power that builds massive projects in seconds with a concurrent agent army.
features: Daily $100 Huge Transaction Volume: Heavy architecture setups.
Dynamic Agent Swarm: Dozens of parallel agent architectures.
Advanced AI Access: Automatically locks onto the smartest models.
Self-Healing System (Auto-Fix): Resolves errors instantly.
Deep Autonomous Tasks: Design and delivery without intervention.

local.title: Must-b Local
local.desc: Cut the cloud connection. For those who want to lock their data and reach unlimited power.
features: Zero API Billing: Use your own API keys (BYOK).
100% Air-Gapped (Offline): Zero telemetry data.
Unlimited Tokens and Transactions: No credit restrictions.
Enterprise Data Indexing: Teach your entire codebase locally.
Custom Skill SDK: Develop specific skills for corporate intranets.

enterprise.title: National Cognitive Infrastructure for Defense and Institutions
enterprise.desc: Must-b Local is not just software; it's your institution's self-sufficient intelligence isolated from the outside world. Eliminate KVKK obligations, end dependence on imported cloud APIs.

onPrem.title: On-Premise Installation
onPrem.desc: Our team installs your system on your closed servers.

airGapped.title: Air-Gapped Security
airGapped.desc: Must-b continues producing even when you pull the internet cable.

independence.title: End of Dependency
independence.desc: Eliminate dependency on foreign cloud APIs with local models.

customRd.title: Custom Training and R&D
customRd.desc: Custom autonomous agents trained according to your institution's internal data.

sections.title: 1. Acceptance of Terms
sections.content: By accessing or using the must-b platform, CLI, or services (the "Service"), you agree to be bound by these Terms of Service. If you do not agree to these terms, please do not use our Service.

sections.title: 2. Subscription and Payments
sections.content: Our order process is conducted by our online reseller Lemon Squeezy. Lemon Squeezy is the Merchant of Record for all our orders. They provide all customer service inquiries and handle returns. Subscriptions are billed in advance on a recurring basis. You can manage your subscription and payment methods through your dashboard.

sections.title: 3. Refund Policy
sections.content: Refunds are handled according to Lemon Squeezy's standard policies. Please contact Lemon Squeezy or our support team if you encounter issues with your purchase. Generally, refunds are available within 14 days of purchase for unused credits.

sections.title: 4. Usage Limits and Cognitive Credits
sections.content: Must-b services are subject to usage limits defined by your subscription plan. "Cognitive Credits" are consumed for API operations and AI processing. If your daily limit is exceeded, service may be temporarily throttled or halted until the next reset period.

sections.title: 5. Intellectual Property
sections.content: The Service and its original content, features, and functionality are and will remain the exclusive property of must-b. Our CLI and software are protected by copyright and trade secret laws. Reverse engineering is strictly prohibited.

sections.title: 6. Limitation of Liability
sections.content: In no event shall must-b, nor its directors, employees, or partners, be liable for any indirect, incidental, special, consequential, or punitive damages, including without limitation, loss of profits, data, or other intangible losses.

sections.title: 7. Contact Us
sections.content: If you have any questions about these Terms, please contact us at legal@must-b.com.

sections.title: 1. Introduction
sections.content: At must-b, we take your privacy seriously. This Privacy Policy explains how we collect, use, and protect your personal information when you use our autonomous AI agents and related services.

sections.title: 2. Information We Collect
sections.content: Account Data: When you register, we collect your email address and basic profile information through Supabase Auth. Payment Data: All payment information is processed securely by Lemon Squeezy. We do not store your credit card details on our servers. Operational Data: We collect metadata related to CLI usage and API consumption to manage usage limits and ensure system stability.

sections.title: 3. How We Use Information
sections.content: We use your information to provide and maintain the Service, process payments via Lemon Squeezy, manage your account through Supabase, and communicate updates or security alerts.

sections.title: 4. Data Security
sections.content: We implement industry-standard security measures to protect your data. Supabase provides our backend security infrastructure, ensuring your data is encrypted and accessible only to authorized entities.

sections.title: 5. Cookies and Tracking
sections.content: We use essential cookies for authentication and session management. We do not use tracking pixels or intrusive advertising cookies.

sections.title: 6. Third-Party Services
sections.content: We rely on third-party providers to deliver our Service: Supabase (Auth/Database), Lemon Squeezy (Payments), and Vercel (Hosting).

sections.title: 7. Your Rights
sections.content: You have the right to access, update, or delete your personal data. You can manage your profile settings in the dashboard or contact us at privacy@must-b.com for data deletion requests.

faq.title: FAQ
faq.subtitle: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.desc: We answered the most curious topics about Must-b for you.

localModels.q: How does Must-b use local models?
localModels.a: Must-b works 100% integrated with local LLM runtimes like Ollama to use the full hardware power (especially GPU) of your computer. You can connect Llama 3, Mistral, or any open-source model you've trained directly. This ensures your code and project files never leave your machine, providing maximum security and zero API costs.

apiKeys.q: Do I need to provide my own API keys?
apiKeys.a: It depends on your plan. Must-b Pro and Elite include access to GPT-4o and Claude 3.5. Must-b Lite and Local allow you to use your own keys (BYOK) or local models to eliminate API costs.

offline.q: Is internet connection mandatory in the enterprise version?
offline.a: No. Must-b Enterprise is designed to work in Air-Gapped environments for sectors like defense, banking, and healthcare where data privacy is critical. It performs zero telemetry and works fully on-premise.

swarm.q: What is the Multi-Agent Swarm architecture?
swarm.a: It's our core technology that turns AI into an autonomous software factory. It divides complex tasks among specialized agents working in parallel—handling UI, database, and terminal operations simultaneously.

cancel.q: Can I cancel my subscription anytime?
cancel.a: Yes. Individual and Professional plans can be cancelled anytime with one click. You retain ownership of all code and architectures created by Must-b forever.

faq.discord: Join our Discord community or write to us →
